pr.title: Add MseeP.ai badge
pr.body:
Hi there,

This pull request shares a security update on anthropic-sdk-typescript.

We also have an entry for anthropic-sdk-typescript in our directory, MseeP.ai, where we provide regular security and trust updates on your app.

We invite you to add our badge for your MCP server to your README to help your users learn from a third party that provides ongoing validation of anthropic-sdk-typescript.

You can easily take control over your listing for free: visit it at https://mseep.ai/app/anthropics-anthropic-sdk-typescript.

Thanks,

The MseeP Team
*MCP servers you can trust*

---

[![MseeP.ai Security Assessment Badge](https://mseep.net/pr/anthropics-anthropic-sdk-typescript-badge.png)](https://mseep.ai/app/anthropics-anthropic-sdk-typescript)
pr.author: mseep-ai
